ground_truth.findings: Heart size is mildly enlarged. There are diffusely increased interstitial opacities bilaterally. No focal consolidation, pneumothorax, or pleural effusion. No acute bony abnormality.
ground_truth.impression: Findings concerning for interstitial edema or infection.
